sourcesContent:
function FileList({ files, isLoading, onDelete }) { return (

Uploaded Files

Browse uploaded files, download them using presigned URLs, or delete them from S3 and DynamoDB.

{files.length} items
{isLoading ? (
Loading files...
) : files.length === 0 ? (
No files found.
) : (
{files.map((file) => (

{file.filename}

{new Date(file.uploadedAt).toLocaleString()}

Download
))}
)}
); } export default FileList;
